creator: 482254ac@razorfever.net
text:
Created attachment 180477
svn patch to latest version

Updates gb to the latest release, with support for v1.8 of the Go runtime.

Fixes broken builds (e.g. sysutils/hfm).

Broken builds look something like this:

_testmain.go:96: cannot use matchString (type func(string, string) (bool, error)) as type testing.testDeps in argument to testing.MainStart:
	func(string, string) (bool, error) does not implement testing.testDeps (missing MatchString method)
FATAL: command "test" failed: exit status 2
